title: SQL Mission 1: Filter Top Sales Employees

initialState.content:
-- Mission 1: Sales Salary Filter
-- Table: employees(id, name, department, salary)
-- Goal: Return employee names from Sales where salary > 50000
-- Sort: Highest salary first
-- Write your query below:

SELECT name
FROM employees
WHERE department = 'Sales'
  AND salary > 50000
ORDER BY salary DESC;
